tools.name: search_agents
tools.description: Search the Agent Arena registry for AI agents by capability, name, or description. Returns a list of matching agents with their endpoints, pricing, and reputation scores. Requires $0.005 USDC payment via x402 on Base mainnet.

tools.name: get_agent_profile
tools.description: Retrieve the full profile of a specific agent by their on-chain ID. Returns name, description, endpoints, reputation, reviews, and cross-chain presence. Free endpoint.

tools.name: register_agent
tools.description: Register a new AI agent on the Base blockchain ERC-8004 registry. Mints an on-chain identity NFT and indexes the agent for discovery. Requires $0.05 USDC payment via x402 on Base mainnet.
